prs_reviewed.title: frontend: EditorDialog: Warn when resource modified during edit

skipped.reason: 34 PRs skipped (sha_unchanged), 165 non-re-review candidates all had human review activity, ~42 drafts

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include auto-close keywords (Fixes #NN, closes #NN) in commit messages (PR body is acceptable).
Approval style is warm and brief: `🎉 thanks!` is the standard merge acknowledgment.
Reviewer @illume is the primary maintainer; issues CHANGES_REQUESTED for commit guideline violations.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — its presence does not indicate human review.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need.
Frontend: fix `exhaustive-deps` violations rather than suppressing with `eslint-disable`.
Backend: use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first style.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic.
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker.
k8s-ci-robot posts IssueComment (not Review) on every PR — do not count as human review.
